title: Clare (Nova Scotia) - Canada.ca
content:
Clare is a wonderful community, rich in culture and heritage. It’s a small community that gives residents the opportunity to succeed in French. Mostly Francophone, it’s also the only municipality in Nova Scotia that offers services in both official languages, English and French.
